title: Agarose Gel Electrophoresis of DNA (1% gel)
title_en: Agarose Gel Electrophoresis of DNA (1% gel)
summary: Preparation and running of a 1% agarose gel to separate DNA fragments by size, followed by visualization under UV light.
summary_en: Preparation and running of a 1% agarose gel to separate DNA fragments by size, followed by visualization under UV light.
source: Agarose Gel Electrophoresis of DNA (1% gel)

materials.name: 10,000X SYBR Safe or ethidium bromide stain
Casting tray, comb, gel tank, power supply

steps.text: Weigh 1 g of agarose and add it to 100 mL of 1X TAE buffer in a flask.
steps.text_en: Weigh 1 g of agarose and add it to 100 mL of 1X TAE buffer in a flask.
steps.verbatim: Weigh 1 g of agarose and add it to 100 mL of 1X TAE buffer in a flask.

steps.text: Microwave the mixture for about 1-2 min, swirling occasionally, until the agarose is fully dissolved and the solution is clear.
steps.text_en: Microwave the mixture for about 1-2 min, swirling occasionally, until the agarose is fully dissolved and the solution is clear.
hazards: Molten agarose is hot — handle with care
hazards_en: Molten agarose is hot — handle with care
steps.verbatim: Microwave the mixture for about 1-2 min, swirling occasionally, until the agarose is fully dissolved and the solution is clear.

steps.text: Let the molten agarose cool to about 55°C.
steps.text_en: Let the molten agarose cool to about 55°C.

gaps.question: How long should the agarose cool to reach ~55°C?

steps.verbatim: Let the molten agarose cool to about 55°C.

steps.text: Add 10 µL of SYBR Safe stain and swirl to mix. CAUTION: ethidium bromide is a mutagen — wear gloves and work in the designated area.
steps.text_en: Add 10 µL of SYBR Safe stain and swirl to mix. CAUTION: ethidium bromide is a mutagen — wear gloves and work in the designated area.
hazards: ethidium bromide is a mutagen — wear gloves and work in the designated area
hazards_en: ethidium bromide is a mutagen — wear gloves and work in the designated area
steps.verbatim: Add 10 µL of SYBR Safe stain and swirl to mix. CAUTION: ethidium bromide is a mutagen — wear gloves and work in the designated area.

steps.text: Pour the agarose into the casting tray with the comb in place.
steps.text_en: Pour the agarose into the casting tray with the comb in place.
steps.verbatim: Pour the agarose into the casting tray with the comb in place and let it solidify at room temperature for 20-30 min.

steps.text: Let it solidify at room temperature for 20-30 min.
steps.text_en: Let it solidify at room temperature for 20-30 min.
steps.verbatim: Pour the agarose into the casting tray with the comb in place and let it solidify at room temperature for 20-30 min.

steps.text: Remove the comb and place the gel into the tank filled with 1X TAE until the buffer just covers the gel.
steps.text_en: Remove the comb and place the gel into the tank filled with 1X TAE until the buffer just covers the gel.

reagents.name: 1X TAE buffer
reagents.condition: until the buffer just covers the gel
reagents.condition_en: until the buffer just covers the gel

steps.verbatim: Remove the comb and place the gel into the tank filled with 1X TAE until the buffer just covers the gel.

steps.text: Mix each DNA sample with 6X loading dye and load the samples into the wells. Load 5 µL of DNA ladder into the first well.
steps.text_en: Mix each DNA sample with 6X loading dye and load the samples into the wells. Load 5 µL of DNA ladder into the first well.
steps.verbatim: Mix each DNA sample with 6X loading dye and load the samples into the wells. Load 5 µL of DNA ladder into the first well.

steps.text: Connect the tank to the power supply and run the gel at 100 V for 30-45 min, until the dye front has migrated about two-thirds down the gel.
steps.text_en: Connect the tank to the power supply and run the gel at 100 V for 30-45 min, until the dye front has migrated about two-thirds down the gel.
hazards: High voltage — do not touch the tank while running
hazards_en: High voltage — do not touch the tank while running
steps.verbatim: Connect the tank to the power supply and run the gel at 100 V for 30-45 min, until the dye front has migrated about two-thirds down the gel.

steps.text: Turn off the power supply and place the gel on the transilluminator to visualize and photograph the DNA bands under UV light.
steps.text_en: Turn off the power supply and place the gel on the transilluminator to visualize and photograph the DNA bands under UV light.
hazards: UV light — wear UV-protective eyewear/face shield
hazards_en: UV light — wear UV-protective eyewear/face shield
steps.verbatim: Turn off the power supply and place the gel on the transilluminator to visualize and photograph the DNA bands under UV light.

open_parameters.question: Which stain will be used — SYBR Safe or ethidium bromide?
What is the run time (30-45 min) and stopping point for the gel?
